args.name: beaconApp
args.desc: The Application ID for the randomness beacon

methods.name: updateApplication
methods.desc: Update the application (should not be available in final stable release)

methods.name: init
methods.desc: Prepare the app after creation, eg opt-in

args.name: bets
args.desc: Array of RouletteBet that the user wishes to place

args.name: mbrFee
args.desc: PaymentTxn to cover the mbr increase of the box creation

args.name: payment
args.desc: AssetTransferTxn to cover the total amoint bet

methods.name: completeGame
methods.desc: Complete a game, this will payout (if won), refund the mbr cost then delete the box

events.name: RouletteGameCompleted
events.desc: TODO include randomness seed data (and pk of vrf signer keypair) so user can verify result was fair

methods.name: cancelGame
methods.desc: Cancel a game in progress, refunds total bet amount, the mbr cost then deletes the box

methods.name: getMbrCost

args.name: bets
args.desc: what bets does the user intend to make

methods.desc: Convenience function to work out how much the mbr will increase by

methods.name: updateManager
methods.desc: Update the manager of this contract

methods.name: deleteManager
methods.desc: Delete the manager of this contract

methods.name: manager

returns.desc: The current manager of this contract

methods.desc: Convenience function to get the current manager of this contract

betAsset.desc: What AssetID does the game accept for bets

prizePool.desc: Amount of funds available to wager against the house

fees.desc: How much fees are waiting to be claimed

game.desc: Each current game stored in a box

sourceInfo.errorMessage: BET_TYPE_NUMBER can only be between 0 and 37
Index access is out of bounds
app should not yet be opted in to the asset
can only call when not creating
manager cannot be the zero address
mbrFee must cover mbr increase, be sent to the app address and come from the caller
must be a well formed transaction to the app address, from the caller and greater than 0
must be greater than or equal to minBet
must be less than or equal to maxBet
must be on or after the reveal round
must be on or after the revealRound + oracle deadline
only the manager can call this method
payment must equal total bet and be sent to the app address
prizePool must be greater than totalBetAmount

events.name: RouletteGameCompleted
events.desc: TODO include randomness seed data (and pk of vrf signer keypair) so user can verify result was fair
